tagline: Your trusted HVAC partner in Denver
about_short: Family-owned since 2003. We keep Denver homes comfortable year-round with expert heating, cooling, and ventilation services.
about_long: Summit Mechanical was founded by Mike and Laura Chen in 2003. What started as a two-person operation has grown into Denver's most trusted HVAC team, with 14 certified technicians serving the front range. We specialize in residential and light commercial HVAC — from emergency furnace repairs to full system replacements. We're proud to maintain a 4.9 rating across 340+ reviews and hold an A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau.

services.name: AC Installation
services.description: Central air, mini-splits, and ductless systems for every home size.

services.name: Furnace Repair
services.description: Same-day diagnostics and repair for all major furnace brands.

services.name: Duct Cleaning
services.description: Improve air quality and efficiency with professional duct service.

services.name: Heat Pump Systems
services.description: Energy-efficient heating and cooling in one unit. We install and service all brands.

services.name: Indoor Air Quality
services.description: Air purifiers, humidifiers, and filtration systems for healthier homes.

services.name: Maintenance Plans
services.description: Annual tune-ups that prevent breakdowns and extend system life.

testimonials.quote: They replaced our entire HVAC system in one day. Professional, clean, and the price was exactly what they quoted.
testimonials.author: Sarah M., Lakewood

testimonials.quote: Called at 6am on a Sunday when our furnace died. Tech was here by 8. Can't recommend them enough.
testimonials.author: James K., Arvada

testimonials.quote: Fair pricing, honest techs, and they actually show up on time. Rare combo these days.
testimonials.author: Linda P., Denver

seo.title: Summit Mechanical | Denver HVAC Repair & Installation
seo.description: Denver's trusted HVAC company since 2003. AC installation, furnace repair, and duct cleaning. 4.9 stars, 340+ reviews. Call (303) 555-0147.
